creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thursday updates are a gamble to get 3 more playable days out of 7 days in a week. "weekly" tag is usually updated ~4 hours after FreeBSD package build starts. If upstream doesn't update server.veloren.net FreeBSD users can downgrade veloren-weekly via /var/cache/pkg.

This can be improved if I knew where to check when a particular "weekly" will be skipped. Some time before Tue/Thu/Sat/Sun 01:00 UTC package build starts.
